description: Fragment of a legal settlement involving a number of relatives and other persons. Dating: mentions Tishrei 1512 Seleucid = 1200 CE. Mentions a sum of 208 dinars, Milāḥ, Riḍā, bt. Majīd, a burj (dovecote?), Yosef and Mufaḍḍal, and payments in installments, and a remaining sum of 130 dinars. (Information mainly from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
